title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Crowd Entertainment Ltd (35,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 35,000 on Crowd Entertainment Ltd. The controller engaged in direct marketing activities without ensuring that it had a sufficient legal basis. Additionally, the controller processed data subjects' identification data excessively, beyond what was neces...
